description: Dishari Picnic 2026 is a relaxed summer gathering where our Bengali community comes together over food, adda, and games in the Boston area 🧺🌳.
Please use this form to register your group so we can plan meals and activities thoughtfully.
By signing up, you help Dishari continue its mission of celebrating Bengali culture and creating a welcoming space for friends, families, and new community members.
We look forward to sharing the day with you.
AGOMONI – THE RISING
Dishari is proud to unveil its MEGA EVENT of 2026, Agomoni - The Rising
A spectacular celebration where tradition meets transformation, and culture rises in all its glory
Prepare yourself for an unforgettable evening of never seen before and soul-stirring performances.
This is NOT JUST AN EVENT - THIS IS AGOMONI—reborn, reimagined, and rising.
The countdown to the rise begins now….Stay tuned, more information to follow soon.

perks: ✓ Up to 6 VIP tickets & 1 group photo at Meet & Greet with Jisshu

description: Dishari proudly invites you to be part of “Mahishasurmardini – Reimagined” — an electrifying celebration of Shakti through the powerful blend of tradition and contemporary dance featuring Kumar Sharma.
This is a golden opportunity to learn and perform with one of the most dynamic dancers of recent times.
REGISTRATION PACKAGE Includes:
• Three virtual mentoring sessions
• One exclusive in-person mentoring session
• Stage performance with Kumar Sharma
• Admission to Agomoni 2026
🎟 Early Bird Offer: $99 only till May 3rd.
✨ Spots are limited — REGISTER NOW !!

sub_events.title: 🎶✨ DISHARI NEXT-GEN PRESENTS — MELODIES RELOADED at Agomoni - The Rising ✨🎶

description: Dishari proudly brings an exciting musical journey — “Melodies Reloaded” -  a vibrant kids’ music segment directed by the immensely talented Shovan Ganguly🌟.
This is a unique opportunity for kids (9-18 Years) to be mentored and perform with master artist Shovan Ganguly.🎤🎵
Please register your kid(s) today to be part of something truly magical.
REGISTRATION PACKAGE Includes:
• Virtual mentoring sessions with Shovan Ganguly
• In-person mentoring session with local mentor(s)
• Stage performance with Shovan Ganguly
• Participant’s Admission to Agomoni 2026
🎟️ Registration Fee: $50 only
✨ Spots are limited — REGISTER NOW !!
